mysite
Table of Contents

Namespace DAL.Contracts

Interfaces

IAgendaRepository

Repository contract for Agenda records that define the weekly operating schedule of a sports space.

IBalanceRepository
IClienteMembresiaRepository
IClienteRepository

Repository contract for Cliente entities, extending standard CRUD with client-specific lookup and membership operations.

IComprobanteRepository
IEjercicioRepository
IEspacioRepository

Repository contract for Espacio (sports space) entities, extending standard CRUD with availability-filtered listing.

IIngresoRepository
IMembresiaRepository

Repository contract for Membresia (membership plan) entities, extending standard CRUD with plan-specific lookups.

IMovimientoRepository

Repository contract for ledger Movimiento (movement) records.

IPagoRepository

Repository contract for Pago entities, extending standard CRUD with payment-specific query operations.

IReservaRepository

Repository contract for Reserva entities, extending standard CRUD with reservation-specific query and availability check operations.

IRutinaEjercicioRepository
IRutinaRepository

Repository contract for Rutina entities, extending standard CRUD with routine lifecycle operations.

IUnitOfWork

Defines a transactional scope that shares a single database connection across multiple repositories.

Made with docfx
